chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2564 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For orders on M.A. No.15058/2024 For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 10.03.2025 None for applicant/accused Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------ This criminal bail application was filed on 04.11.2024 and it was fixed in Court on 21.02.2025, when none appeared for applicant. Today, the position is same, neither the applicant is in attendance nor his counsel. It appears that they have lost their interest to pursue this case, therefore, instant criminal bail application is dismissed on account of non- prosecution. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
